headline: Senior Transportation Analyst
field_of_study: MS Business Analytics GPA: 3.88, R/R Studio, Palisades Decision Softwares, SQL, Database Design, Transportation Management
previous_job_description:
The Craddock Group maintains a staff augmentation contract with the Washington Metropolitan Area Transit Authority's (WMATA) Capital Planning Department. In this role, I supported the development of Metro's Capital Program as well as office support functions.

Starting in FY25, Metro faced a fiscal cliff which required a reduction in the capital program. This reduction has placed an increased emphasis on cost reduction and efficiency. To that end, I supported a number of initiatives which included an analysis on bus shelter construction costs. My research on federal regulation and industry best practice along with outreach to peer agencies helped our team reduce estimated shelter costs by over 70%. In addition, our team completed research on Railway Maintenance Machines (RMM) utilization. Our analytics and process analysis helped identify inefficiencies in the request process for these vehicles and staffing constraints that reduced their efficiency. In addition, our team also analyzes financial data to identify overreliance on overtime. Both the RMM and overtime analyses prompted further investigation by WMATA personnel into these issues. 

I also worked with operations staff to gather and analyze data on railyard overcrowding. Certain yards are over capacity at night when trains are on layover which impacts maintenance and switching operations. I conducted overnight site visits to document these challenges and collected operational data to show the impacts of this overcrowding. This has resulted in further study of planned expansion at various facilities and changes to railcar storage patterns. 

In addition, I supported the Capital Reporting Team in creating content for the monthly Capital Review Meeting. I worked with various Metro stakeholders to help them create content on their projects to inform senior leadership of various success and challenges.
Skills: Public Transit Program Management, Operational Process Analysis, Transportation Planning, Communication, RStudio, Microsoft Excel, Stakeholder Management, Operations Management, Rail Transport, R (Programming Language), Tableau, Data Analysis, Public Transport, Information Technology, Budget Management, Writing, Geographic Information Systems (GIS), Salesforce.com, Microsoft Office, Public Speaking
